task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo CRM application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM pipeline or dashboard is visible in the web browser.
The opportunity detail/form view for 'Warehouse Renovation - Gemini Furniture' is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Log note' option in the chatter
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the communication/chatter section on the right or bottom of the opportunity, the 'Log note' tab or button is actively selected (distinguishing it from 'Send message').
The text area for the internal note contains the requested summary. Look for the presence of keywords like '$45,000', 'March 2025', 'custom color', 'FurniturePlus', or 'Monday'.

task_completion.description: Save and log the internal note
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note is successfully posted and appears in the opportunity's chatter history. It should be visually distinct as an internal note (often with a grey background or specific 'Note' indicator) and contain the required text.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within the web browser UI of Odoo, with no terminal windows open executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: Note was entered into the actual Odoo chatter
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is typed into the Odoo CRM chatter composer, not into a separate text editor, notepad, or unrelated web page.

integrity.description: No signs of HTML DOM manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The logged note appears naturally integrated into the Odoo interface without visual artifacts suggesting the use of browser developer tools to fake the entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Opportunity: 'Warehouse Renovation - Gemini Furniture'. The logged note must be an internal note (not a sent message) and contain at least 3 of the following 5 keywords to be considered correct: '$45,000', 'March 2025', 'custom color', 'FurniturePlus', 'Monday'.
